title: EU Regulatory procedure for SCP-based products
author: Akuratiya, Kushan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This flowchart provides a detailed visualization of the multi-layered authorization process in the EU for Single Cell Protein (SCP) products. It maps the distinct regulatory pathways based on product classification (Novel Food, Food Enzyme, Feed Material, GMO-status, etc.) as analyzed in the associated research article  "EU Regulatory Landscape for Microorganisms Used in Food and Feed".
steps_raw: This flowchart provides a detailed visualization of the multi-layered authorization process in the EU for Single Cell Protein (SCP) products. It maps the distinct regulatory pathways based on product classification (Novel Food, Food Enzyme, Feed Material, GMO-status, etc.) as analyzed in the associated research article  "EU Regulatory Landscape for Microorganisms Used in Food and Feed".
